SOCIETY AND CULTURE
dreams held by many to be mere legends from the long ago glory days of the Star League_ Others could be manufactured only by automated factories, the secrets of their underlying tech- nologies long forgotten. complete account of the events behind the change is beyond the scope of this work: The following excerpts offer a overview of humanity $ technological reversals of fortune. along with brief looks at few of the most Important technological breakthroughs the past millennium:
humanity s fall We had little hope of stopping the downward spiral, which continued t0 accelerate
RECOVERY From The Universe Today; Dr. Andrea Paliwoda _ ComStar Archives, 3058 The 3030s and 3040s were almost entirely devoted to the recovery of lostech, made possible by the discovery of the Star League memory core O Helm in 3024. With few exceptions most notably Prince Hanse   Davion' war 3039 the Successor States concentrated all their efforts on unlocking the technological secrets of the past. Each; of course hoped to be the first to redevelop the one weapon that would let them con- quer their neighbors and re-create the Star League under their leadership. Though reinventing the wheel took time by the fifth decade of the thirty-first century: the people of the Inner Sphere were beginning t0 reap the benefits of the rediscoveries_ The stan- dard of Wving rose a5 new medicines were introduced and fac- tories were repaired and upgraded after centuries of neglect. This technological resurgence breathed new life into the shat: tered economies of the Successor States, which stimulated fur- ther research and development programs_ The dark ages were slowly fading as institutions Iike the NAIS almost daily announced the development of another new vaccine Or device Or technique tor building something lighter and stronger. By 3050_ the Inner Sphere had unlocked most of the technological secrets ost aiter  the fall the Star League (though many 0f these technologies were still in their prototype stages and years away from practica everyday use). Just in Lime turns out-~in 3050 the Clans came back reclaim their lost home tnrough military conquest:
TOUGH FALL From Forecasts Irorn the Past; Secrets the Star League Revealed, Dr. William Squire, NAIS Press_ 3041 Few would argue that the human race has reached the Iim- its of what we can achieve The journey tOward ascension is never-ending stairway;   taking us   higher and   higher; always extending beyond our wildest hopes_ Occasionally plateau; prief rest stop where we can catch our breath and see the Dig picture few shortsighted individuals mistake this for the tinal step never seeing the rest of the stairway that rises in the distance. And because these fools are often the most outspoken_ the rest of humanity listens; Only when the likes Newton; Einstein Kearny and Fuchida make their incredible discoveries does the stairway again emerge from the fog of ignorance, allowing u5 continue on our journey; The path slippery: however; and occasionally we fall back- ward Sometimes whole civilizations are lost; as with the wonder- full cities built by the Mayan Indians of lerra' Americas Other times only the knowledge lost. as with the ancient Egyptians Or the Inner Sphere following the fall of the Star League. Until the Star League demise were headed In the right direction_ The fusion reactor and the KF drive allowed us t0 conquer the stars_ Terraforming enabled us conquer Mother Nature_ Advancing medical technology allowed uS conquer disease after disease We had not. nowever, conquered human: most primal tlaws ealousy and greed_ The Succession Wars that raged for almost two and half centures nearly dragged the human race back to the Stone Age. Nuclear firestorms ate Up laboratories and factories, consuming tnelr scientific secrets and the researchers who had unlocked tnose mysteries: By the dawn of the thirty-first century each of the Successor States was dire straits The technologies they had come t0 rely on had virtually vanished, Wunto only few auto mated  factories still capable of manufacturing much-needed devices Iike the KF drive. Some pieces of technology such as the myomer implantation device ad the gauss rifle , could longer  be produced Humans coined new word lostech ~to describe these lost technologies_ During the dark ages of the Succession Wars_ the quality of life declined to low not seen centuries_ Many remote worlds were reduced to subsistence farming; with no technology more advanced than beast pulling metal plow: Some colonies sim ply vanished The men and women who could have nelped t0 pull the Inner Sphere out of these desperate times were instead kept busy building the machines destruction that had caused
CATCH-UP From Our Century; Part IV; Kana Sohiri, Digest of Our Times; Tharkad Press, 3060 first, many generals believed the Clans were invading aliens from some unknown planet deep the galactic core Many people have since ridiculed that error but given the evidence available to them; the mistake was understandable_ The Clans possessed technology far superior anything armies had ever fielded, and they used completely foreign tac tics_ Elementals battle armor, which ooked t0 us Iike some kind of mythica monsters further convinced many that the Clans were not human When finally  found out    that were   fighting fellow humans the discussions turned from What are they? How did they develop those weapons ahead of us?" At least rets rospect; the answer simple They didn't fight two and half centuries worth of Succession Wars While the Inner Sphere wasted its energies conflict, the Clans built society thousand light years away: With knowledge of the Star League ad many of its top scientists_ they continued t0 develop new and better technologies_ Medical and planetary sciences wiped out deadly plagues and made
